networkfirewall.firewallpolicy.stateless.Docs: An integer setting that indicates the order in which to run the stateless rule groups in a single [AWS::NetworkFirewall::FirewallPolicy](aws-resource-networkfirewall-firewallpolicy.md). Network Firewall applies each stateless rule group to a packet starting with the group that has the lowest priority setting. You must ensure that the priority settings are unique within each policy.
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the stateless rule group.
